subject: enable sparky to interact with schema ms and aaf
commit_message:
enable sparky to interact with schema ms and aaf

Add support to make sure of the schema ms
add support to make use of aaf interaction
update portal props with correct Impl class
add the missing portal property configurations

Issue-ID: AAI-2201

Change-Id: Ic47d62922b1aecaf99f06a50aec10ca674c8b927
Signed-off-by: renealr <reneal.rogers@amdocs.com>

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1:

Hi Morgan. Would it be possible  if you can provide logs for onap-aai-aai-sparky-be-8664d99588-2nddd or do kubectl describe on that pod? I'm assuming that you integrated these changes into your charts, how did you go about doing this?

Patch Set 1:

> Hi Morgan. Would it be possible  if you can provide logs for
 > onap-aai-aai-sparky-be-8664d99588-2nddd or do kubectl describe on
 > that pod? I'm assuming that you integrated these changes into your
 > charts, how did you go about doing this?

Hi Reneal
what we do is an installation based on OOM (with version from OOM repo) + overwritte of some files based on the patchset files

As the Gating platform is reused permanently we are not able to troubleshoot a posteriori.

However the artifacts (installation and tests) are kept for some days (2 by default? need to check) 
for this gating for instance, https://gitlab.com/Orange-OpenSource/lfn/onap/xtesting-onap/-/jobs/169430139/artifacts/download

in the k8s logs, we store the status of the pods, deployments, events
The events provide some information
I could add a describe pod for the non Running POD, I will do.

regarding aai-sparky, I can see in the current logs
pods
onap-aai-aai-sparky-be-8664d99588-vnc7b                        1/2       CrashLoopBackOff   14         1h
deployment
onap-aai-aai-sparky-be                        1         1         1            0           1h
svc
aai-sparky-be                      10.43.161.120   <nodes>                                8000:30220/TCP                                                1h
